description: Moesif is an API analytics, observability, and monetization platform for monitoring API and AI traffic, analyzing usage, and supporting usage-based billing. It provides tooling for ingesting API events and querying or managing analytics and billing data.
summary: Moesif exposes documented HTTP APIs for event ingestion and management, plus a published npm CLI (`moesif-eth`) for uploading Ethereum ABI artifacts; both use Moesif-issued credentials.
